info.english_meaning: to endure to suffer to tolerate to forgive
info.kOmudIDAtukramANkaH: 4.103 kzamU~ ityasya ayaM zit-pAWaBedaH sidDAntakOmudyAM pAWitaH nAsti parantu kzIrataraNgiRyAM dfSyate

upasargachandrika.example_text: ''BI nu mA vfzaBa cakzamITAH' (f0 2337) dayasva mAmanugfhARa mAM vetyAha
'yUyaM naH putrA aditeradabDA aBi kzamaDvaM yujyAya devAH' (f0 2283) sAnugrahA BavatetyarTaH
'aBi no vIro arvati kzameta' (f0 2331) uktacara evArTaH
